# garage.co.nz - AI Readiness Audit

Free tool to check if your website is optimized for AI search engines.

## What We Check

| Check | Weight | What We Look For |
|-------|--------|------------------|
| Meta description | 20% | Exists, 50-160 chars, clear purpose |
| robots.txt | 10% | Exists, doesn't block AI bots |
| llms.txt | 20% | AI instruction file at /llms.txt |
| LLM-LD | 15% | Structured data at /.well-known/llm-index.json |
| Schema.org | 15% | JSON-LD markup in page |
| Content structure | 10% | Proper headings (H1, H2), lists |
| HTTPS | 5% | Secure connection |
| Response time | 5% | Under 3 seconds |

## Scoring

- **70-100 (Green):** AI Ready - well optimized for AI search
- **40-69 (Amber):** Partially Ready - has basics, missing AI-specific features
- **0-39 (Red):** Not AI Ready - AI assistants will struggle

## How to Use

1. Go to https://garage.co.nz
2. Enter your website URL
3. Get instant score (free)
4. Submit email for detailed fix-it guide

## Contact

hello@garage.co.nz
